# Oxmgr vs PM2 Benchmarks

- Generated: 2026-07-06T09:12:37.682967+00:00
- Host platform: linux (Linux 6.17.0-1018-azure)
- Node.js: v20.20.2
- pm2 command: `/opt/hostedtoolcache/node/20.20.2/x64/bin/pm2`
- oxmgr binary: `/home/runner/work/OxMgr/OxMgr/target/release/oxmgr`

GitHub-hosted runners are noisy. Treat the numbers as trend signals, not absolute lab measurements.

| pm2 | 393.4 | 395.7 | 57668.0 |

## Quick Read

- Empty-daemon boot: oxmgr 3.90x lower vs pm2
- Empty-daemon RSS: oxmgr 8.72x lower vs pm2
- Restart command latency: oxmgr 1.35x lower vs pm2
- Restart TCP-ready latency: oxmgr 1.65x lower vs pm2
- Crash replacement PID visibility: oxmgr 57.92x lower vs pm2
- Crash ready-event emitted latency: oxmgr 5.56x lower vs pm2
- Crash TCP-ready latency: oxmgr 5.15x lower vs pm2
- Daemon RSS at 100 processes: oxmgr 16.74x lower vs pm2
